title: Proton (¹H) NMR spectroscopy
summary: 9701 A Level ¹H NMR — chemical shift, integration, splitting, and D₂O exchange.
learningObjectives: Assign chemical shifts to proton types.
Use integration to find relative H numbers.
Explain D₂O exchange for labile protons.

simpleExplanation.title: Proton fingerprint of a molecule
simpleExplanation.summary: ¹H NMR reveals how many hydrogen types exist, their ratio, neighbours (splitting), and whether they are acidic/exchangeable.

sections.content: **¹H NMR** (37.4) is heavily examined. Combine with **37.3** and **mass spec** (22.2) for full structure elucidation.
